creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
On 07/14/11 15:47, Frank Wall wrote:
> http://permalink.gmane.org/gmane.os.netbsd.devel.pkgsrc.cvs/157474
Yes, rdoc needs rdoc to install.  The 1st install bombs the ruby rdoc.
Thats why the second one works.  I've had some emails with steve@ about
this (and a hack to try to fix it).
